# MEOK AI Labs

> 340+ Model Context Protocol (MCP) servers for AI compliance. One server per regulation. MIT-licensed, PyPI-installable, MCP-registry registered.

Built by MEOK AI Labs (CSOAI Ltd, UK Companies House 16939677). Solo founder Nick Templeman, Yorkshire UK.

## Links

- [Site](https://meok.ai): main site
- [Fleet hub](https://meok.ai/fleet/): all 340+ packages
- [Scorecard](https://proofof.ai/scorecard): 7-surface coverage
- [Landing pages](https://meok.ai/dist/): one per compliance domain
- [Practitioner guides](https://meok.ai/guides/): implementation walkthroughs
- [Full package index](https://meok.ai/llms-full.txt): for LLM crawlers

## Installation

```
pip install <package-name>
# or
uvx <package-name>
```

## Coverage

- 340+ packages
- All in the official MCP registry
- All on PyPI (4 throttled, 24-48h to clear)
- 7-surface coverage (server.json, A2A agent, ACP, llms.txt, glama, smithery, badge) for 100%

## Featured regulations

- EU AI Act (40+ articles as separate packages)
- DORA / NIS2 / CRA (financial + cyber resilience)
- GDPR + ISO 42001 + SOC 2 + PCI DSS + HIPAA
- FDA SaMD + MDR + Canada AIDA + UK Bribery Act + more
